description_long: This is a round, multi-layered chocolate cake with a rich, textured chocolate frosting covering the sides and top. The cake is decorated with three small yellowish spherical fruits and a triangular piece of chocolate on top, adding a touch of elegance. The sides are adorned with rectangular pieces of dark chocolate featuring white swirl patterns, evenly spaced around the circumference. A large slice has been cut out, revealing three visible layers of chocolate sponge alternating with creamy white filling. The cake's surface has a glossy sheen, suggesting a ganache or similar smooth icing. The overall appearance is indulgent and visually appealing, suitable for display in a bakery window or at a festive urban event.
description: A round, multi-layered chocolate cake with chocolate frosting, decorative chocolate pieces, and a glossy finish. A slice is cut out, revealing layered chocolate and cream inside.
description_view_0: Front view of the whole cake, showing the decorative chocolate pieces and fruits on top, with no slice missing.
description_view_1: Side view with a slice removed, exposing the layered interior and the decorative top with fruits and chocolate.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large cut-out section, clearly displaying the three layers of cake and cream filling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cut-out slice visible, showing the cake's interior and the top decorations from a different angle.
